title: Not Haughty Is My Heart

verses.text: Not haughty is my heart, not lofty is my pride; I do not seek to know the things God's wisdom has denied.
With childlike trust, O Lord, in you I calmly rest, contented as a little child upon its mother's breast.
O people of the Lord, in him alone confide; from this time forth and evermore his wisdom be your guide.
